question: Which channel uploaded the most videos?
sql: SELECT c.Channel_Name, COUNT(*) AS total_uploads FROM fact_input_video_operations f JOIN dim_channel_client c ON f.Channel_ID = c.Channel_ID GROUP BY c.Channel_Name ORDER BY total_uploads DESC LIMIT 10

question: How many videos were uploaded in March 2025?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_uploads FROM fact_input_video_operations f JOIN dim_date d ON f.Upload_Date_ID = d.Date_ID WHERE d.Month = 3 AND d.Year = 2025

question: How many Key moments clips were processed?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM fact_output_video_operations fo JOIN dim_output_type ot ON fo.Output_Type_ID = ot.Output_Type_ID WHERE ot.Output_Type = 'Key moments'

question: Show me the upload to publish funnel per channel
sql: SELECT c.Channel_Name, COUNT(DISTINCT fi.Fact_Input_ID) AS uploaded, COUNT(DISTINCT fo.Fact_Output_ID) AS processed, COUNT(DISTINCT fp.Fact_Publish_ID) AS published FROM dim_channel_client c LEFT JOIN fact_input_video_operations fi ON c.Channel_ID = fi.Channel_ID LEFT JOIN fact_output_video_operations fo ON fi.Fact_Input_ID = fo.Fact_Input_ID LEFT JOIN fact_publish_information fp ON fo.Fact_Output_ID = fp.Fact_Output_ID GROUP BY c.Channel_Name ORDER BY uploaded DESC
filters_applied: LEFT JOINs used to include all channels

question: Which platforms have the most billable published videos?
sql: SELECT p.Platform_Name, COUNT(*) AS billable_count FROM fact_publish_information fp JOIN dim_platform p ON fp.Platform_ID = p.Platform_ID WHERE fp.Is_Billable = 'True' GROUP BY p.Platform_Name ORDER BY billable_count DESC

question: How many videos were uploaded per language?
sql: SELECT l.Language_Name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM fact_input_video_operations f JOIN dim_language l ON f.Language_ID = l.Language_ID GROUP BY l.Language_Name ORDER BY total DESC

question: Which user uploaded the most videos?
sql: SELECT u.User_Name, u.Team_Name, COUNT(*) AS total_uploads FROM fact_input_video_operations f JOIN dim_user_team u ON f.User_ID = u.User_ID GROUP BY u.User_Name, u.Team_Name ORDER BY total_uploads DESC LIMIT 10

question: What are the most common errors in data quality?
sql: SELECT Error_Type, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM fact_data_quality GROUP BY Error_Type ORDER BY occurrences DESC

question: How many videos were published to Instagram?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS instagram_publishes FROM fact_publish_information fp JOIN dim_platform p ON fp.Platform_ID = p.Platform_ID WHERE p.Platform_Name = 'Instagram'

question: Show monthly upload trend for 2025
sql: SELECT d.Month, d.Year, COUNT(*) AS total_uploads FROM fact_input_video_operations f JOIN dim_date d ON f.Upload_Date_ID = d.Date_ID WHERE d.Year = 2025 GROUP BY d.Year, d.Month ORDER BY d.Month
